falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,500 (a key resistance level from the bottom_2024_aug pattern) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would indicate a bullish reversal, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting the pattern is not repeating as expected.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average true range (ATR) of the S&P 500 drops below 50 points
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decrease in volatility would invalidate the blowoff score's implication of imminent volatility, suggesting a consolidation phase instead of a blowoff.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the S&P 500 fails to break below the 200-day moving average (a key support level from the bottom_2024_aug pattern) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Failure to break below this support would indicate the pattern is not repeating, invalidating the current HOLD signal and suggesting a different market dynamic.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
